feature: Daily Statistics Page Permissions - Tab-level Control
summary: Verified Daily Statistics page permissions work like Settings page pattern with independent tab-level control

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - non-blocking

features_tested.feature: Daily Statistics page loads with all 3 tabs for admin user
features_tested.details: All 3 tabs visible: المسجد الحرام (Haram), المسجد النبوي (Nabawi), العرض الشامل (Combined)

features_tested.feature: Permissions Manager shows Daily Statistics sub-items
features_tested.details: Found 3 sub-items under الإحصائيات اليومية: المسجد الحرام, المسجد النبوي, العرض الشامل with independent visibility and edit toggles

features_tested.feature: Daily Statistics appears as single link in sidebar
features_tested.details: Daily Statistics (/daily-stats) appears as single link, NOT as dropdown. Tab links are hidden from sidebar (sidebar_hidden=true)

features_tested.feature: Stats Analytics appears as separate sidebar link
features_tested.details: تحليلات الإحصائيات (/stats-analytics) visible as separate link in sidebar

features_tested.feature: Independent toggle buttons for each tab
features_tested.details: Each sub-item (Haram, Nabawi, Combined) has independent eye (visibility) and pencil (edit) toggle buttons

screenshots: .screenshots/02_daily_stats_tabs.png - Shows all 3 tabs on Daily Stats page
.screenshots/17_daily_stats_expanded.png - Shows Permissions Manager with Daily Stats section

context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Statistics permissions feature is fully implemented. The page has 3 tabs (Haram, Nabawi, Combined) with independent permission control in the admin Permissions Manager. The sidebar shows Daily Statistics as a single link (not dropdown) because tab items have sidebar_hidden=true. Stats Analytics is a separate sidebar link.

permissions_manager.toggle_buttons: Each sub-item has independent visibility (eye) and edit (pencil) toggles
